# services.stargazer

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.stargazer`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.stargazer.allowCgiUser` | `boolean` | When enabled, the stargazer process will be given `CAP_SETGID` and `CAP_SETUID` so that it can run cgi processes as a different user. This is required if the `cgi-user` option is used for a route. Note that these capabilities could allow privilege escalation so be careful. For that reason, this is disabled by default. You will need to create the user mentioned `cgi-user` if it does not already exist. |
| `services.stargazer.certLifetime` | `string` | How long certs generated by Stargazer should live for. Certs live forever by default. |
| `services.stargazer.certOrg` | `string` | The name of the organization responsible for the X.509 certificate's /O name. |
| `services.stargazer.connectionLogging` | `boolean` | Whether or not to log connections to stdout. |
| `services.stargazer.debugMode` | `boolean` | Run Stargazer in debug mode. |
| `services.stargazer.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Stargazer Gemini server. |
| `services.stargazer.genCerts` | `boolean` | Set to false to disable automatic certificate generation. Use if you want to provide your own certs. |
| `services.stargazer.group` | `string` | Group account under which stargazer runs. |
| `services.stargazer.ipLog` | `boolean` | Log client IP addresses in the connection log. |
| `services.stargazer.ipLogPartial` | `boolean` | Log partial client IP addresses in the connection log. |
| `services.stargazer.listen` | `list of string` | Address and port to listen on. |
| `services.stargazer.regenCerts` | `boolean` | Set to false to turn off automatic regeneration of expired certificates. Use if you want to provide your own certs. |
| `services.stargazer.requestTimeout` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Number of seconds to wait for the client to send a complete request. Set to 0 to disable. |
| `services.stargazer.responseTimeout` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Number of seconds to wait for the client to send a complete request and for stargazer to finish sending the response. Set to 0 to disable. |
| `services.stargazer.routes` | `list of (open submodule of attribute set of (INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string)))` | Routes that Stargazer should server. Expressed as a list of attribute sets. Each set must have a key `route` that becomes the section name for that route in the stargazer ini cofig. The remaining keys and values become the parameters for that route. [Refer to upstream docs for other params](https://git.sr.ht/~zethra/stargazer/tree/main/item/doc/stargazer.ini.5.txt) |
| `services.stargazer.routes.*.route` | `string` | Route section name |
| `services.stargazer.store` | `absolute path` | Path to the certificate store on disk. This should be a persistent directory writable by Stargazer. |
| `services.stargazer.user` | `string` | User account under which stargazer runs. |
